summary: Physical Stamp Ordering workflow fully tested - Advocate order placement, TLS Admin read-only view, and IDC Super Admin Kanban management all working correctly

backend_api_tests: Authentication - IDC Super Admin login (superadmin@idc.co.tz) - PASS
POST /api/physical-orders - Create order with Certificate stamp - PASS
POST /api/physical-orders - Create order with Notary stamp - PASS
POST /api/physical-orders - Create order with Ink refill - PASS
GET /api/physical-orders - TLS Admin can view all orders - PASS
GET /api/physical-orders/{id} - TLS Admin can view single order - PASS
PUT /api/physical-orders/{id}/status - TLS Admin denied (403) - PASS (read-only enforced)
GET /api/physical-orders - IDC Super Admin can view all orders - PASS
GET /api/physical-orders/stats/summary - IDC Super Admin stats - PASS
PUT /api/physical-orders/{id}/status - Full workflow transition (pending_review → delivered) - PASS
POST /api/physical-orders/{id}/notes - Add notes to order - PASS

Certificate Stamp button visible and clickable - PASS
Notary Stamp button visible and clickable - PASS
Format selection (Desk/Pocket) works - PASS
Add to Cart button works - PASS
Cart updates with items and pricing (TZS 150,000) - PASS
Ink Refill section visible - PASS
Delivery Address field works - PASS
Checkout button enabled when cart has items - PASS
TLS Admin Orders Page (/admin/orders) loads - PASS
Read-only banner displayed - PASS
Status summary cards visible (Pending Review, Approved, etc.) - PASS
Order list displays correctly - PASS
Search functionality available - PASS
No edit/update buttons visible (read-only confirmed) - PASS
IDC Super Admin Kanban Page (/super-admin/orders) loads - PASS
All 7 Kanban columns visible - PASS
Order cards display in correct columns - PASS
View toggle (Kanban/List) available - PASS
Order detail modal opens on click - PASS
Status update buttons visible (Approved, In Production, etc.) - PASS
Status update works (order moved to Approved) - PASS
Tracking number input available - PASS
Notes section with input available - PASS
Toast notification shows on status update - PASS

critical_code_review_comments: Status transitions are properly validated with valid_statuses list in server.py line 1917
TLS Admin (role=admin) correctly denied from updating status (403) - enforced at line 1914-1915
IDC Super Admin (role=super_admin) has full order management access as intended
Kanban columns correctly map to all valid statuses: pending_review, approved, in_production, quality_check, ready_dispatch, dispatched, delivered
Status history correctly tracks all transitions with timestamp and user name

idc_super_admin.note: Different from review_request credentials - this is the seeded user

seed_data_creation: Test orders with TEST_ prefix created during testing for workflow verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Physical Stamp Ordering workflow is fully functional: 1) Advocate can order Certificate/Notary stamps with Desk/Pocket formats and Ink refills at /order-stamp, 2) TLS Admin has read-only view at /admin/orders showing all orders with status filters, 3) IDC Super Admin has full Kanban management at /super-admin/orders with drag-drop status updates, tracking number input, and notes. Note: Seeded super_admin credentials are superadmin@idc.co.tz / IDC@SuperAdmin2024 (different from review_request)

status_transitions.workflow: pending_review → approved → in_production → quality_check → ready_dispatch → dispatched → delivered
